description: Annual-average CRC/USD exchange rate, used to derive the USD column of cr_bccr.csc_comercio. 2010–2021 from the CSCCR 'TC' sheet (BCCR); 2022–2024 supplemented from World Bank / CEIC.
source: CSCCR 'TC' sheet — Banco Central de Costa Rica, annual average; CEIC / World Bank PA.NUS.FCRF annual average — transcribed 2026-05-22 (2023 approximate); re-verify
licence: open data — Costa Rican official statistics (BCCR / MCJ)
